sid_to_description.gold: Pet 'n Shape Duck Skewers are high protein, low fat treats made with chicken breast fillets wrapped around a rawhide chew. Each treat is digestible and roasted for quality and flavor. They contain no artificial colors, additives, or preservatives, and are free of wheat, corn, and soy. All Pet 'n Shape treats are U.S. lab tested for safety. The resealable packaging locks in freshness for easy storage.
sid_to_description.generated: Hartz Originals Beef Jerky Dog Treats are made with real beef, no artificial flavors, and contain no corn, wheat, or soy. These treats are a great source of protein and are highly digestible. They are made in the USA with ingredients from around the world. The treats are slow-cooked in small batches to preserve natural flavor and nutrients.

sid_to_description.gold: All-Season is a year-round food source of marine and vegetable proteins. Marine proteins promote growth, while high vegetable content ensures digestion in all temperatures. Shrimp and spirulina help maintain vibrant colors in koi. This formula can be used with other Dainichi Koi Foods, and is beneficial in cooler weather when koi metabolism is slower. A two-step application of vitamins and minerals, especially vitamins C & E, maintain koi luster, sheen, and whites. All-Season contains calcium mo
sid_to_description.generated: TetraCichlid Floating Cichlid Pellets are a staple diet for all cichlid species, offering a complete and balanced diet with added vitamins. They are rich in protein and color-enhancing ingredients. The pellets float and are easily digestible, leaving less waste for a cleaner aquarium. Feed two to three times daily, only as much as your fish can consume within several minutes. This food is suitable for all cichlid species, including African cichlids, and is also suitable for other tropical fish.

sid_to_description.gold: Enchanted Home Pet furniture offers a luxurious cushion for your pet's comfort and warmth. The Dreamcatcher dog bed is caramel-colored and suited for medium-sized dogs up to 30 lbs. It features fully upholstered, furniture-grade construction with wood feet that lift the bed off the ground, keeping your pet draft-free. It also includes storage for toys and bones. The bed size is 32.5" x 21" x 12", with a sitting area of 22" x 16". The cushion cover is removable and washable. The bed is designed f
sid_to_description.generated: The Pet Life Melamine Sculpture Pet Bowls are designed for dogs and cats. The bowls are made of melamine and are available in various colors. The 1-cup size has a 5-inch diameter and is suitable for small dogs and cats. The 2-cup size has a 7-inch diameter and is suitable for medium dogs and cats. The 3-cup size has an 8-inch diameter and is suitable for large dogs and cats. The bowls are dishwasher safe on the top rack and can be microwaved.
